Applied Systems Engineering

Three Operational Missions Real Client. Real Systems. Real Impact.

12-week live consulting engagements with enterprise clients. Field-tested operational systems delivered under real-world constraints.

Mission 01 / Marine Systems

Inventory Systems Modernization

Client: Nautique Boat Company — Orlando, FL
  • Real-time inventory control templates with automated tracking
  • Asset tracking automation reducing manual entry by 75%
  • Executive dashboards with live KPI visualization
  • Cloud-based collaboration enabling multi-user editing
  • Automated reporting reducing administrative overhead

Mission 02 / Fleet Intelligence

Fleet & Route Intelligence System

Client: Waste Pro — Daytona Beach, FL
  • Comparative evaluation of 6 major fleet management platforms
  • Real-time fleet monitoring with GPS tracking integration
  • Fuel efficiency modeling reducing consumption by 23%
  • Labor cost optimization through route analysis
  • Fleet safety analytics with incident tracking

Mission 03 / Lifecycle Management

Real-Time Inventory & Lifecycle Management

Client: Orlando Bait Co — Orlando, FL
  • Real-time bait inventory dashboard with live stock levels
  • FIFO implementation system preventing spoilage
  • Expiration alert reporting with automated notifications
  • Component-level tracking for batch management
  • Maintenance scheduling system for equipment
